2026-05-14.patch_summary: This patch introduces a new function, queued_spin_release(), which is an arch-overridable unlock primitive. It refactors the existing arch-specific queued_spin_unlock() overrides on x86 (paravirt) and MIPS to use this new function. The change is preparatory for adding contended_release tracepoint instrumentation to queued_spin_unlock().

2026-05-15.patch_summary: This patch refactors the queued spinlock code to introduce a new function, queued_spin_release(), which is an arch-overridable unlock primitive. The existing arch-specific overrides on x86 (paravirt) and MIPS are renamed to queued_spin_release(). This change does not introduce any functional changes.
